name: Dhawal Pandya
heroLine: I build the machinery under money, and I watch everything run.

paragraphs: The first true thing I can say about myself is that I could read. Everything else followed from that. A chemistry degree, chosen because it made me feel like a wizard. Four years and three attempts at a thing that did not work out. Then, on the first of January 2022, a hundred-day plan into code, and the discovery that the foundations of existence were written in it.

Now I build the machinery under money for a living. I work from Valsad, the town I grew up in, near a beach with black sand, with the ocean for a screensaver. I read more than is useful. I build small games nobody asked for. The cells living and dying behind these pages do not need you to look at them.
about.photoHold: this photo took forty attempts. the code took less.
